title: unona boivinii
intro: Unona boivinii, also known as African white sandalwood, is a tropical tree native to the tropical regions of East Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Unona boivinii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
